findings.title: Missing 3 stages in Lead Pipeline
findings.detail: Pipeline 'Lead Pipeline' in glendale is missing stages that Grapevine has
findings.expected: Stages: Appt Booked, Appt Confirmed, New Lead, Not Interested, No‑Show, Nurture / Cold, Replied, Tour Complete [Pending], Tour Complete [Sold]
findings.actual: Missing: New Lead, No‑Show, Nurture / Cold
findings.fix: Add missing stages to glendale's 'Lead Pipeline' pipeline in GHL

findings.title: Wrong timezone in UDT_Make_Call -> Check Business Hours
Wrong timezone in UDT_GV_POST_CALL -> Check If Item Exists
Missing pipeline: 1. Enrollment Pipeline
findings.detail: Grapevine has pipeline '1. Enrollment Pipeline' (13 stages) but glendale does not
findings.fix: Create '1. Enrollment Pipeline' pipeline in glendale GHL with 13 stages matching Grapevine
